race.comment: HE'S MY WARRIOR (1) consistent gelding who comes back in grade for this and his best form is over this trip. Rattled late from near last on the turn with a narrow fourth over 1200m at Tamworth in BM82 class. Winning apprentice retains the ride and can race a touch closer from the good gate. Hard to hold out. FAN HARDER (7) showed ability over further in Highway grade last time in and looks to get a better set-up today with the key jockey change. Assess on his good first-up run behind Brutal Belle at Scone. That form has since produced a city winner. Leading contender. SORRENTO PALACE (10) gripped on late in the heavy going third-up with a fighting second over 1200m at Bathurst. Can slide across from the awkward gate and figure prominently. FIRE 'N' STONE (13) lightly raced filly who resumes for her second prep. Fitted with the two trials and can pull out a big run fresh with Dalton's claim. Expected to go on with it this time in.
